app.name: Kilo Code
app.one_liner: Kilo is the all-in-one agentic engineering platform that enables developers to build, ship, and iterate faster using an open-source coding agent powered by 500+ AI models.

screens.name: Main Workspace
screens.purpose: Primary interface for interacting with the Kilo agent through natural language prompts, viewing generated code, and managing tasks.
primary_actions: Switch between agent modes (Architect, Coder, Debugger)

rust_commands.name: install_cli
rust_commands.purpose: Install the Kilo CLI globally via npm.

rust_commands.name: kilo_web
rust_commands.purpose: Launch the web-based UI for Kilo (currently disabled due to lack of support).

mvp_plan: week 1: Integrate inline autocomplete in VS Code extension
week 1: Set up core agent loop with natural language input and code generation
acceptance_tests: Agent must respect user permission configuration when using edit tools in Ask mode.
CLI installation must clarify behavior of hidden .kilo launcher file on certain systems.
The 'kilo web' command must be disabled by default as the OpenCode web UI is unsupported.
